# .github/release-notes-instructions.md

## Categories
- **✨ Features** — new filters, distributions, trackers, or manifolds
- **🐛 Fixes** — bug fixes and correctness improvements
- **⚡ Improvements** — performance, numerical stability, API polish
- **📚 Docs** — documentation, examples, tutorials
- **📦 Dependencies** — dependency changes

## Skip
Do not generate entries for:
- CI/CD only changes
- test-only changes
- internal refactors with no user-visible effect

## Style
- Write for users of PyRecEst, not for maintainers
- Mention affected modules/classes when possible
- Use concise present-tense bullets
- Prefer concrete behavior changes over implementation details
